# KnowledgeDigest

> Portable SQLite knowledge database with LLM summarization for local document collections.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/lukisch/knowledgedigest
Owner: lukisch
License: MIT
Primary language: Python
Runtime: Python 3.8+, standard library only

## Summary

KnowledgeDigest indexes large local document collections (PDF, DOCX, TXT, HTML, Markdown)
into a fully-searchable SQLite database with FTS5. An LLM summarization queue (Claude Haiku)
processes documents into structured 3–5 sentence summaries with keyword and domain tagging.
Designed for offline-first, local-first use with BACH agent system integration.

## Intended users

- Researchers maintaining large personal document libraries
- LLM agents that need a queryable local knowledge base before answering questions
- Developers building document-aware AI assistants
- Anyone who wants full-text search + LLM summaries over local files

## Main interfaces

- `python -m KnowledgeDigest ingest /path/to/docs --recursive` — ingest and index documents
- `python -m KnowledgeDigest search-all "query"` — unified full-text search
- `python -m KnowledgeDigest status` — DB statistics
- `python -m KnowledgeDigest summarize --limit N` — LLM batch summarization
- Python API: `from KnowledgeDigest import KnowledgeDigest`

## Key files

- `README.md`: human-facing overview, quickstart, architecture
- `schema.py`: SQLite schema v3 (31 tables)
- `digest.py`: main API class
- `extractor.py`: text extraction (PDF, DOCX, TXT, HTML, MD)
- `chunker.py`: sentence-boundary chunking (~500 tokens/chunk)
- `summarizer.py`: LLM summarization via Haiku API
- `indexer.py`: BACH skill indexer
- `wiki_indexer.py`: BACH wiki indexer
- `ingestor.py`: document ingestion pipeline
- `requirements.txt`: dependencies

## Search keywords

local knowledge base, SQLite document index, LLM summarization, FTS5 search,
offline-first knowledge management, document chunking, personal document search,
PDF indexing, DOCX indexing, Claude Haiku batch processing, local-first AI,
Python knowledge base, document understanding, semantic knowledge management
